title: 132A0002, 103A105 3000mAh 22V For gtech battery replacement Li-ion Battery compatible with Gtech AirRam MK2, MK2 K9，AR20, AR21, AR29, AR30; Fits Bissell Sweepers & Vacuums
features: Precise compatibility：Fully compatible with Gtech AirRam MK2/MK2 K9 & Bissell 132A0002/103A105 AR20, AR21, AR29, AR30 sweepers/vacuums. 22V nominal voltage (25.2V charging / 16.5V discharging) + 3000mAh capacity + 6S1P configuration—exact parameter match for original batteries, no wiring modification needed, plug-and-play instantly.

Safe and reliable：Crafted with new high-quality lithium-ion cells—safer, more reliable, and free of memory effect. Charge/discharge anytime without capacity loss; supports 300 charge cycles (maintains 80%+ capacity after long-term use). 1A charging current & 15A discharge current ensure stable power output for efficient cleaning.

Multiple Protection Functions：Made of premium materials to prevent voltage errors, with 4 core protections: short circuit, overheating, overcharging, and overdischarging. No leakage, explosion, or device damage risk—safe for daily home cleaning.

Easy installation：Same size as original battery—fits perfectly into your vacuum’s battery compartment. No tools required for 10-second installation; fully compatible with original chargers (no need for extra adapters). 15A discharge current delivers strong suction support, matching your device’s original performance.
Design with green light：4 STAGE LED INDICATOR，It is convenient to check the remaining power of the battery.
We provide them with 1 year quality guarantee.
description: New vacuum cleaner battery: Nominal voltage: 22V Capacity: 3000mAh Battery type: lithium battery Charging voltage: 25.2V Discharge voltage: 16.5V Combination: 6S1P Cycle times: 300 times Charging current: 1A Discharge current: 15A Shelf life: 1 year Fully Compatible with Gtech AirRam MK2, MK2 K9 vacuum cleaner; Applicable to BISSELL/Bisheng alternative product model: 132A0002 103A105 Compatible models: AR29; AR30; AR27; AR31; AirRam2K9+MultiK9; AirRam2+Multi
